items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-80 eastbound between 1.2 miles west of Exit 97: US 219 - DUBOIS/BROCKWAY and 0 miles east of Exit 97: US 219 - DUBOIS/BROCKWAY. There is a lane restriction.
